title: Wonderful
positive:
Pretty good value for money, more expensive than South Africa, but that's Botswana.
Best steak I've had for a long time in their restaurant. Better than one the previous week in a very expensive Safari Lodge.  Everything you could reasonably need on site, staff a very friendly and welcoming
negative: Heritage roons a bit on the basic side, no window or ventilation in the bathroom, no fridge.. Would recommend taking one if the chalets that look much nicer and rack rate is not much more. It was perfectly adequate for our short stay though.

title: Wonderful
positive:
This hotel is rated way too low. Most don’t come to Maun to stay in Maun, but if you do stay in town, this spot is wonderful. It’s on its own private reserve about 15-20 minutes from the airport, really peaceful and quiet.
Very friendly service here. Was given an early check in as they were not fully booked. The grounds are beautiful. Only small issue is the shower is not very good. It sprays everywhere and was having issues to get it to be hot temperature. The WiFi, AC and beds were all perfect.
negative: Shower was not great.

title: Very Good
positive: The place is in a lovely quiet place close to Maun. No traffic noise, view to the river (rather dry when we were there, but nice and green. Large trees shading the whole property. Two clean pools. Bar and restaurant, food is fine. Large, simple, comfortable chalets with comfortable beds and ensuite, A/C, mosquitonet, coffee/tea. Clean.
negative: We got the out of season rates on arrival, but next day the receptionist raised the prices, apparently the owners had raised the prices without her knowledge. I tried to reason with her that a deal is a deal, but no luck. Checked the price on Booking.com and found a cheaper price than the new price and including breakfast, so paid the agreed rate for the first night and bought the second night online. Problem solved, but a little irritating. Restaurant nice, but service takes f-o-r-e-v-e-r... Even getting a drink, not to mention food. Prepare yourself, maybe bring a snack while you wait for the food!

title: “Really great place to stay in Maun on a gorgeous property”
positive:
This was my first time to Island safari and I really liked it. The place is massive and gorgeous. And I really mean massive; it's a 5 min drive from the gate to the reception along a dirt road that sometimes has khudu and other antelopes which was cool. The staff were very welcoming and kind. The dinner we got was delicious and honestly really affordable as well. The breakfast is filling and delicious as well with everything you'd want for a meal to start your day. The rooms were clean and the beds were very comfortable; I slept great. Really glad I stayed there and look forward to future stays whenever I'm in Maun. 
Another thing I'd recommend is going for a morning hike on the property. There are a few loops you can do that are a few kilometers.
negative: I'd say the main thing I didn't like, and to be fair this is many places in Maun, is that the water sometimes runs brown. It usually clears up after you run it for some time. But it would be great if they added an additional filtration system to the water system. The fridges are always stocked with bottled water for drinking as well.
raw_text:

title: “An idyllic first stop in Botswana.”
positive:
This was our first stop in Botswana and it was idyllic. We were picked up from the airport at short notice due to a change in our flights. We had a mini game-drive on the way!!
The room was wonderful and comfortable. The grounds were tidy and full of wonderful wildlife to spot. The pool was refreshing and clean. The river walk was wonderful. The food was great. Everything about this stay was fantastic.
negative: Having to leave so soon!

title: “The hotel itself was good, but the behavior of the local people ruined our stay.”
positive:
The location was great. Not far from the airport, but you can enjoy the river view.
The food is good.
The room was spacious, and had a fridge, hair dryer, and free water bottles.
negative:
The water was very rusty and brown.
The website said there was a fireplace, but the staff said they were not gonna lit it when it is not very cold though we went there within the sightseeing season. We bought some marshmallows and sticks to roast, but we couldn't do that.
At night, a tremendous number of cars came along the river, ( I think it was more than 200 cars!!) and each of them played VERY loud music until 22:00 or so. Next morning, they left with a lot of waste in the middle of the nature!! The staff said this is the normal behavior of the people there (it was not a special occasion or anything). That ruined our stay.
raw_text:
Reviewed: October 1, 2023

 Japan

The water was very rusty and brown.
The website said there was a fireplace, but the staff said they were not gonna lit it when it is not very cold though we went there within the sightseeing season. We bought some marshmallows and sticks to roast, but we couldn't do that.
At night, a tremendous number of cars came along the river, ( I think it was more than 200 cars!!) and each of them played VERY loud music until 22:00 or so. Next morning, they left with a lot of waste in the middle of the nature!! The staff said this is the normal behavior of the people there (it was not a special occasion or anything). That ruined our stay.

The location was great. Not far from the airport, but you can enjoy the river view.
The food is good.
The room was spacious, and had a fridge, hair dryer, and free water bottles.

title: “Amazing lodge close to river”
positive: It was my second time in this lodge in Maun. My first time was 8 years ago and i think this place is very unique, beautiful  peaceful. I recommend this lodge, you have a beautiful river with cows and donkeys. The chalets are very nice , confortable and big. The dinner, breakfast are very good and not expensive. I thank you all the staff, very professionnal,  with smile, the best staff in a hotel after 6 hotels in Botswana.
negative: Take care don t wait to book a room lastminute...i wanted to stay 2 nights more but it was overbooked unfortunately i had to change my hotel.

title: “An unforgettable island safari experience, marked by exquisite cuisine, impeccable service, and comfortable accommodatio”
positive: I had an incredible three-night stay at the island safari lodge! The highlight for me was undoubtedly the delectable food; the chef's skills were truly remarkable. The staff, from Tumo the bartender and the attentive waitstaff to the diligent housekeeping team, made my stay exceptionally comfortable. The rooms were not only cozy but also impeccably clean. Overall, a fantastic experience that left me thoroughly satisfied.
negative: While my overall experience was fantastic, I did encounter a minor setback. Unfortunately, one waiter seemed unfriendly, which was a contrast to the otherwise wonderful staff. Additionally, the absence of Wi-Fi in the rooms posed a challenge, especially since I was there for work. As someone who relies on a stable internet connection for remote work, the lack of Wi-Fi in the rooms impacted my productivity. It would be beneficial to consider providing Wi-Fi access in the rooms for guests who need it for work or other purposes.
raw_text:
Reviewed: December 30, 2023

 Botswana

While my overall experience was fantastic, I did encounter a minor setback. Unfortunately, one waiter seemed unfriendly, which was a contrast to the otherwise wonderful staff. Additionally, the absence of Wi-Fi in the rooms posed a challenge, especially since I was there for work. As someone who relies on a stable internet connection for remote work, the lack of Wi-Fi in the rooms impacted my productivity. It would be beneficial to consider providing Wi-Fi access in the rooms for guests who need it for work or other purposes.

I had an incredible three-night stay at the island safari lodge! The highlight for me was undoubtedly the delectable food; the chef's skills were truly remarkable. The staff, from Tumo the bartender and the attentive waitstaff to the diligent housekeeping team, made my stay exceptionally comfortable. The rooms were not only cozy but also impeccably clean. Overall, a fantastic experience that left me thoroughly satisfied.
